visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins in a brightly lit studio environment featuring a white fireplace and modular shelving. Three women are captured in rapid motion; the central figure in a white overall dress moves frantically while holding white papers, while another woman in a black skirt and a third in a striped shirt throw papers and clothes around them, creating a sense of chaotic activity. (2) The perspective shifts to a medium shot of the woman in the striped shirt sitting on the floor, surrounded by piles of colorful clothing items. She holds up a white garment with large colorful polka dots, her facial expression showing clear frustration and stress. (3) A white handheld device is introduced in a close-up shot, revealing its sleek design and the brand name on its side. The central woman in the white dress holds it up, smiling broadly while the camera focuses on the device's functional head and power buttons. (4) The woman in white demonstrates the device on a black garment laid flat on an ironing board and then on a pink shirt hanging on a rack. Visible steam is seen emitting from the device as she glides it across the fabric. (5) Multiple shots show the device being folded into a compact form and placed near a rack of various hanging clothes. The women interact around the clothing rack, pointing at the garments and the device with enthusiastic gestures. (6) In the final phase, the woman in the striped shirt holds the device and mimics a frustrated action before laughing. The woman in white stands next to her, both smiling and gesturing towards the camera as the scene concludes in a lively, conversational manner.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: hahababy. [Slogan]: 新品直播前 有多忙. (2) [Slogan]: 款式確認 梳化 官網上架. (3) [Slogan]: 衣服樣品. (4) [Subtitle]: 衣服為什麼還是皺的. (5) [Subtitle]: 因為你沒有用這個. [Slogan]: 山崎全球通用 美型摺疊蒸汽掛燙機. (6) [Subtitle]: 操作超簡單. (7) [Subtitle]: 裝水、預熱. (8) [Subtitle]: 35秒快速出蒸氣. (9) [Subtitle]: 垂直燙 水平燙 都可以. (10) [Subtitle]: 溫和除皺不傷衣物. (11) [Subtitle]: 遇到過熱或乾燒 也不用擔心. (12) [Subtitle]: 它有安全保護裝置. (13) [Subtitle]: 待機超過八分鐘 也會自動停止加熱 會自動斷電. (14) [Subtitle]: 像我們 hahababy 常常需要出國拍攝 然後這台它就是 全球電壓通用 到哪裡都可以安心用 你不用再轉換電壓 也不用怕燒壞 全世界都通用. [Slogan]: 全球電壓通用. (15) [Subtitle]: 而且呢 它體積小不佔空間 這樣折起來收納在行李箱 直接帶著走. (16) [Subtitle]: 這台很讚內 每次出國的時候 都怕衣服燙不平 然後用飯店的吹風機 也都燙不平 氣死!. [Variety]: 氣死!. (17) [Subtitle]: 用這台就好啦 出國不管去哪裡 都不用怕衣服皺巴巴的. (18) [Subtitle]: 闆娘闆娘 公司需要多買幾台. (19) [Subtitle]: 沒問題啊 現在團購中 自己下單.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in white, 1 supporting female in striped shirt, 1 background female.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A female with long dark hair wearing a white apron-style dress over a black long-sleeved turtleneck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist studio with white walls, a decorative white fireplace mantel, and a tall white modular shelf containing small ornaments and a yellow plush toy. A clothing rack with various colorful garments is positioned on the right.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with high-tempo, bouncy acoustic guitar-driven pop music accompanied by a rhythmic drum beat. Loud rustling sounds of paper and enthusiastic female shouting and chatter create an atmosphere of chaotic excitement. (2) A female voice exhibits high vocal arousal, shouting a question about wrinkled clothes with an exaggerated, frustrated tone. The BGM remains steady and upbeat in the background. (3) A second female voice responds with a bright, helpful tone, introducing a product. The music dips slightly in volume to accommodate a new male narrator. (4) A male professional narrator enters with high clarity and a friendly, persuasive delivery style. He lists technical features including easy operation and 35-second steam release, his voice perfectly balanced with the rhythmic background track. (5) A mechanical clicking sound is heard, indicating a device being folded. The second female voice returns, discussing travel and global voltage with a casual, vlog-style prosody. (6) A sharp, high-pitched vocal exclamation '气死!' (extremely angry) occurs, followed by the two female voices engaging in a playful, laughing dialogue about purchasing the device for their company. The music swells slightly towards the end before a crisp hard cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Demonstration -> Social Proof/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a portable garment steamer by Yamasaki, specifically targeting the audience of the hahababy brand. It uses a comedic scenario of pre-livestream chaos and travel frustrations to highlight the product's convenience, global voltage, and compact size.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the Yamasaki steamer, naming of its features, and a group buy call-to-action in the subtitles.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video blends social media vlog aesthetics with professional product demonstration, using fast-paced editing and variety-show style text to maintain high engagement.
